faqs.question: How do I apply for the Pioneer Heritage card?
faqs.answer: The Pioneer Heritage is largely invite-only or available to IndusInd Bank's high-value customers. You may request an upgrade from existing premium IndusInd cards or apply with proof of ₹40 LPA+ income.

faqs.question: Does the lounge access include guest visits?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Pioneer Heritage card offers unlimited domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass, and this includes guest access so companions can join you at the lounge.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹25,000 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹15,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year. The ₹15L milestone benefit also includes fee reversal.

faqs.question: What is the effective reward rate on travel spends?
faqs.answer: With 8 RP per ₹100 at a point value of ₹0.75, the effective reward rate on travel and international spends is 6% - one of the highest available on any Indian credit card.
